title: DevFlow
description: Full-stack journaling application for creating and managing daily entries with secure authentication.
highlights: Implemented JWT authentication and bcrypt password hashing for secure login.
Designed RESTful APIs and MongoDB data models for users and entries.
Used upsert-based persistence to manage journal updates efficiently.
Separated client and server architecture for scalability.

title: Web E-Commerce Application
description: REST API and web application simulating an online store backend with product filtering and image uploads.
highlights: Built Express REST API serving product and category data from JSON datasets.
Integrated Cloudinary image hosting using Multer middleware.
Designed service-layer architecture for cleaner modular code.
Implemented filtering endpoints for category and publish-state queries.

title: Superstore Data Visualization
description: Retail analytics project analyzing sales data and generating dashboards and visualizations.
highlights: Cleaned and transformed transactional datasets using Pandas.
Generated charts for sales trends, profit by region, and top products.
Built Power BI dashboards and Excel pivot tables for KPI analysis.
Automated data loading and reporting workflows.

title: MERN To-Do List Application
description: Task management application using the MERN stack with persistent storage.
highlights: Implemented CRUD API endpoints connected to MongoDB.
Connected React frontend with backend APIs using fetch/axios.
Enabled dynamic task creation, updates, and deletion.
Improved project setup and environment configuration.
